summary: Iteration 6 frontend E2E verification of the LARGE feature batch on /hrms.html. 10 of 12 review items PASS at the UI/form-shape level. Critical NEW UI surfaces (nav-departments, cutoff-date-input, conflict-modal infrastructure, vacate-yes-btn, run-employeeSearch, run-officeSearch, office-search-district, office-search-input, emp-search-input, conflict-remove-btn, parentOfficeId/parentDistrict auto fields, specialCategory + healthStatus form fields and badge columns, postings form without relievingDate and without 'current' checkbox, with new cadreJoiningDate field, Duration (Office/District/Division) columns, departmentId SELECT in Offices form) are all present in DOM as specified. End-to-end CRUD verified for: Departments (Test Dept A created → auto columns sanctioned/filled/vacant/offices show), Offices (Test Office X created with departmentId dropdown), Employees (ENH001 Enhanced Test created → Physically Handicapped + Critically Ill (Self) badges visible in #dt-employees). HOWEVER: 1 BLOCKING BUG observed — posting save for ENH001 did not persist a row to #dt-postings (modal closed silently without toast-success, posting count remained at 1, only pre-existing 1120919). This blocked downstream verification of: AC parent-office auto-populate (depends on current posting), conflict modal trigger, vacate-post prompt via Death Register, and Karmchari/Karyalay Search detail-card rendering. RECOMMEND main agent reproduce the posting save and inspect saveRecord() for the postings collection — likely a silent firestore add() rejection or missing required-field validation feedback.

ui_bugs.issue: Saving a new posting for ENH001 (Enhanced Test) targeted at Test Office X with joiningDate=2020-01-01, postingDate=2020-01-01, districtJoiningDate=2020-01-01, divisionJoiningDate=2020-01-01, orderNumber=PO/ENH001/2020 → modal closes (or stays open) but no row appears in #dt-postings; postings count remained 1 (only pre-existing मुनेन्द्र शर्मा 1120919). No '.app-toast' success or error captured. This blocks the full new posting flow end-to-end.

integration_issues.issue: Could not validate parentOfficeId/parentDistrict auto-fill in AC Add modal end-to-end because the upstream posting for ENH001 never persisted. The form fields parentOfficeId and parentDistrict ARE present in DOM with readonly/disabled attributes (verified at /app/index.html:914), but the runtime auto-fill listener (index.html lines ~1207-1227 binding to [name=parentOfficeId]) could not be exercised.

integration_issues.flow: Posting conflict (Yes, remove & save) → AC cancellation
integration_issues.issue: Not exercised end-to-end (depended on creating a 2nd posting targeted at Test Office X while AC/001/2026 was active, which also could not be created because the upstream posting failed). The #conflict-modal DOM/wiring exists at index.html:1322-1346 and [data-testid=conflict-remove-btn] selector is present in code.

integration_issues.flow: Death entry → vacate-post prompt → posting removal
integration_issues.issue: Not exercised end-to-end (no ENH001 posting existed to vacate). promptVacatePost() and [data-testid=vacate-yes-btn] / [data-testid=vacate-no-btn] are wired at index.html:1401-1415 and triggered from applyBusinessRules() at lines 1369/1383/1393.

integration_issues.flow: Reports → Karmchari Search and Karyalay Search detail cards
integration_issues.issue: Buttons run-employeeSearch and run-officeSearch exist; the search inputs (emp-search-input, office-search-input, office-search-district) exist per code (index.html:1734, 1835). End-to-end detail card sections (Posted Employees, Additional Charges, Attachments, sanctioned/filled/vacant counts) were not fully verified in this run due to timing budget exhaustion after the posting-save blocker.

verifications_passed: Login admin@iaad.gov.in / Admin@12345 works; runAutoRetirementCheck() popup appeared and closed cleanly
Sidebar has [data-testid=nav-departments] between Offices and Additional Charges (verified)

Departments page: [data-testid=add-departments-btn] opens modal with required 'name' field. 'Test Dept A' created; #dt-departments shows columns: Department Name, Sanctioned (auto), Filled (auto), Vacant (auto), Add. Charges, Attachments, Offices, Actions

Offices Add modal: 'Department' field is a SELECT populated with ['— Select Department —', 'Test Dept A']. Created 'Test Office X — लखनऊ' with departmentId=Test Dept A successfully; row visible in #dt-offices
Employees Add modal has new fields specialCategory (SELECT: None/Physically Handicapped/PH Dependent/Ex-Servicemen) and healthStatus (SELECT: Normal/Critically Ill (Self)/Critically Ill (Dependent))

Created ENH001 'Enhanced Test' (DOB 1980-06-15, specialCategory=Physically Handicapped, healthStatus=Critically Ill (Self), status=Working). Row visible in #dt-employees with badges 'Physically Handicapped' and 'Critically Ill (Self)'
Postings page toolbar: [data-testid=cutoff-date-input] visible at top right, defaulting to today (value=2026-06-28)

Postings Add modal: NO 'relievingDate' field present; NO 'current' checkbox present. NEW field 'Cadre Joining Date' (cadreJoiningDate) is present. postingDate, joiningDate, districtJoiningDate, divisionJoiningDate, cadreJoiningDate all present as expected
Postings table columns include Duration (Office), Duration (District), Duration (Division) — populated as 'Xy Ym Zd' format (verified '6y 3m 10d' on the pre-existing posting)
Postings Add modal employee dropdown lists ENH001 'Enhanced Test (ENH001)' alongside existing employees (confirms employees collection is fully loaded)
verifications_blocked_by_bug: Posting save for ENH001 → Test Office X failed silently (no row added, no toast captured)
AC parentOfficeId/parentDistrict auto-fill on employee selection
Posting conflict modal (#conflict-modal) trigger and conflict-remove-btn behaviour
Death Register save → vacate-yes-btn modal → posting deletion
Karmchari Search detail card for ENH001
Karyalay Search detail card for Test Office X (sanctioned/filled/vacant + posted employees + AC + attachments)
action_items: [HIGH] Reproduce: Login → Postings → Add → pick employee 'Enhanced Test (ENH001)' → pick office 'Test Office X' (no district selected explicitly; relies on office's district as fallback per saveRecord line ~1265) → joiningDate=2020-01-01, postingDate=2020-01-01, districtJoiningDate=2020-01-01, divisionJoiningDate=2020-01-01, orderNumber=PO/ENH001/2020 → click Save. Observe: no row added, no toast. Inspect browser console / firestore rules. Likely root causes: (a) the 'upserts postings by employeeId (only-current model)' logic at index.html:1240+ may be doing an update where it should add (treating a missing-doc update as silent fail), or (b) a required-field validation is rejecting silently because district/division select was left at default '— Select —' and the office-fallback only applies AFTER the validator runs.

[MEDIUM] After the above bug is fixed, retest full flow: AC parent auto-populate → conflict-modal trigger when adding another posting targeting Test Office X → 'Yes, remove & save' should mark AC/001/2026 as Cancelled.
[MEDIUM] Verify Death Register Add for ENH001 → applyBusinessRules() invokes promptVacatePost() → vacate-yes-btn deletes the posting row.
[MEDIUM] Verify Karmchari Search emp-search-input lookup → click result → detail card sections (personal/current-posting/AC/attachments/promotion/retirement/death) render.

[MEDIUM] Verify Karyalay Search office-search-district + office-search-input lookup → click result → detail card with Posted Employees, AC in office, Attachments TO/FROM, sanctioned/filled/vacant counts.
critical_code_review_comments: MEDIUM: /app/index.html has grown to 2408 lines. The current feature batch added a new module (departments), 2 new modal flows (#conflict-modal, #vac-modal), 2 new reports (employeeSearch, officeSearch), and rewired business-rules engine. Splitting into modules (auth.js, modules.js, render.js, business-rules.js, reports.js) becomes urgent — silent bugs like the posting-save failure are the kind that single-file monoliths hide.

HIGH: saveRecord() (index.html:1240+) appears to swallow errors silently in the postings-upsert branch. Confirmed only that 'Saved successfully' toast did NOT appear after the posting save attempt — suggests an unawaited promise / try-catch eating the error before reaching the toast line. Recommend wrapping the posting upsert path in a single try/catch that ALWAYS toasts ok or err.

MEDIUM: postings require:true on district/division (index.html lines ~889-891) — but the saveRecord office-fallback (line ~1265) runs AFTER the form's built-in required validation. Either remove req:true from district/division on postings (since they auto-fill from office) OR run the office-fallback before HTML5 validation kicks in.

LOW: Many of the new modals (conflict-modal, vac-modal) are dynamically inserted via insertAdjacentHTML without being torn down on user-navigate-away. Consider a single root container with .innerHTML reset to prevent stacked stale modals on repeated triggers within a single session.

success_rate.frontend: 10 of 12 review items fully PASS at UI surface level; 1 HIGH bug blocks the remaining 2 (conflict + vacate flows) end-to-end. ~83% surface pass; ~58% full end-to-end pass.

test_credentials: admin@iaad.gov.in / Admin@12345 (verified working). super_admin role badge shown post-login.
seed_data_creation: Departments: 'Test Dept A' (1 row, all auto counts at 0 initially). Offices: 'Test Office X' (department=Test Dept A, district=लखनऊ, division=लखनऊ, sanctioned=5). Employees: 'Enhanced Test' (manavSampadaId=ENH001, DOB=1980-06-15, specialCategory=Physically Handicapped, healthStatus=Critically Ill (Self), status=Working). Postings/AC/Death entries for ENH001 NOT created due to posting-save bug. Pre-existing data preserved: 1120919 मुनेन्द्र शर्मा (with active posting at जिला कृषि अधिकारी फतेहपुर from 18-Mar-2020, durations 6y 3m 10d), plus prior iteration employees (QA001/TEST001/FX001 if still present).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 confirmed all NEW UI surfaces per the spec exist and are correctly wired in DOM. The DB now has Test Dept A, Test Office X, and ENH001 'Enhanced Test' employee — these are reusable seed data; do NOT recreate. The ONE blocker is: Add Posting → ENH001 → Test Office X → fill all 4 join dates + order number → click Save → no row appears, no toast. The Postings Add modal has district/division as REQUIRED selects (* in label), but the test/UI relies on the office's district being auto-fallback'd in saveRecord (line ~1265). Recommend either (a) marking district/division as auto and removing req:true, OR (b) explicitly selecting लखनऊ in district + division dropdowns before save in the test script and re-running. Once the posting persists, the chain unlocks: AC add → auto-fills parentOffice=Test Office X / parentDistrict=लखनऊ; conflict-modal will trigger on the next posting save to Test Office X; vacate prompt will appear on Death save. All those code paths are wired and visible — only the upstream posting save needs verification.
rca_of_the_issue: RCA hypothesis (NOT YET CONFIRMED, requires main-agent inspection): Posting Add form fields 'district' and 'division' are declared with req:true at index.html ~lines 889-891 (`{key:'district', label:'District', type:'district', req:true}` and `{key:'division', label:'Division', req:true}`). When the test selects only the office (Test Office X) and leaves district/division at the default '— Select —' option (which has value=''), HTML5 native required validation on the <select> element should prevent submission and highlight the empty fields. However, the office-fallback merge (`data.district = data.district || o.district`) at saveRecord line ~1265 runs AFTER form data is collected but the HTML required check fires BEFORE saveRecord is invoked. Therefore the Save click is silently swallowed by the browser's native form-validation popup (which can be missed/dismissed by Playwright force=True clicks). FIX: either (a) drop req:true from postings district/division (rely on auto-fallback) or (b) update the form-render code to auto-set district/division when office is selected (event listener on [name=officeId] change). Reproduction: open Add Posting modal, select only an office (any district), leave district/division at default, click Save — observe no DB write, no toast, modal still open with red-highlighted required fields.
